activities.title: Distinguishing RNA Genome Types
activities.activity_preamble: This activity builds a foundation by clarifying how different RNA genomes relate to translation and replication.
activities.learner_task: Study the explanation and worked example. Complete the classification table by comparing genome types. Use the checklist to verify accuracy.
activities.expected_output: A completed comparison table correctly distinguishing RNA genome types with accurate explanations for each column.
activities.reasoning_orientation: Focus on why translation differs between genome types.

activities.title: Analysing Hepatitis C Entry Strategy
activities.activity_preamble: This activity develops analytical thinking around multi-step viral entry.
activities.learner_task: Analyse the scenario and complete the table explaining roles and advantages of each step.
activities.expected_output: An analysis showing how multiple receptors improve infection efficiency.
activities.conceptual_contrast_prompt: Compare single vs multi-receptor entry outcomes.

activities.title: Evaluating Viral Regulation and Immune Evasion
activities.activity_preamble: This activity focuses on evaluating key regulatory and evasion strategies.
activities.learner_task: Complete comparison and decision tables, then evaluate which mechanisms are most effective and justify your reasoning.
activities.expected_output: A justified evaluation identifying most effective mechanisms with reasoning.
